title: senna multijuga subsp. doylei
intro: Senna multijuga subsp. doylei is a plant species within the senna genus, known for its medicinal properties and traditional use. It is traditionally used as a laxative due to its high concentration of anthraquinone glycosides, which stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. The health benefits of Senna multijuga subsp. doylei include promoting regular bowel movements, relieving symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), and aiding in weight loss. Herbal preparations of Senna multijuga subsp. doylei can be found in various forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas, although it is recommended to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
